title: Pan-Seared Haddock with Ethiopian Spice
description: A flavorful and spicy pan-seared haddock dish, inspired by the bold flavors of Ethiopian cuisine.
instructions: Season the haddock fillets with salt and pepper.
Heat 2 tbsp of butter in a large skillet over medium-high heat.
Add the garlic and cook for 1-2 minutes, until fragrant.
Add the haddock fillets and cook for 3-4 minutes on each side, until cooked through.
Remove the haddock from the skillet and set aside.
Add the remaining 2 tbsp of butter to the skillet and stir in the Ethiopian Spice Blend.
Return the haddock fillets to the skillet and spoon some of the spice butter over the top.
Serve the haddock hot, garnished with chopped parsley.
